description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front features a covered carport with a wide entryway, a large window with a yellow accent border, and a small landscaped area with greenery. The side of the house includes a prominent external staircase leading to the roof, which is bordered by a simple metal railing. Windows are rectangular with blue-tinted glass, and the main door is wooden, set into a recessed entry. The roof has visible utility structures and blue elements, possibly representing HVAC or solar installations. The overall color palette is dominated by white and gray, with accents of blue and yellow.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, carport, external staircase, and blue-accented windows. The design features clean lines, a wooden entry door, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entry with a wooden door, large window with yellow trim, and a landscaped strip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase to the roof, a blue-tinted window, and utility structures on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a central wooden door, two blue-tinted windows, and the staircase wrapping around the side.
description_view_3: Back view displaying two blue-tinted windows and the flat roof with visible rooftop elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, adjacent to a large window with yellow trim and a landscaped strip, no porch or columns.
